author: Raahil Shah
hardware_notes: 8xH100 SXM target unless record README says otherwise
notes: Exact current-session rerun used the record-local script snapshot and local dataset/tokenizer paths.
Metric semantics were preserved from the record-local script; compare only against records with matching evaluation mode.
See the local run log for the concrete throughput and final metric lines on this host.
claimed_run_name: Int6 MLP3x + SmearGate + BigramHash + OrthoInit + Muon WD + SWA
submission_blurb: Per-row int6 quantization on MLP/attention weights with zstd-22 compression, enabling 3x MLP expansion (hidden=1536). SmearGate blends adjacent token embeddings via a learned gate. BigramHash embedding (4096 buckets, dim=128) captures token-pair context. Orthogonal weight initialization with muP output scaling. Muon optimizer with decoupled weight decay (WD=0.04) and momentum warmup (0.92->0.99 over 1500 steps). Stochastic Weight Averaging every 50 steps over the last 50% of training. Trained at seq_len=2048 with batch=786432, grad_clip=0.3, warmdown=3000. Sliding window evaluation at stride=64.
claimed_method_summary: Per-row int6 quantization on MLP/attention weights with zstd-22 compression, enabling 3x MLP expansion (hidden=1536). SmearGate blends adjacent token embeddings via a learned gate. BigramHash embedding (4096 buckets, dim=128) captures token-pair context. Orthogonal weight initialization with muP output scaling. Muon optimizer with decoupled weight decay (WD=0.04) and momentum warmup (0.92->0.99 over 1500 steps). Stochastic Weight Averaging every 50 steps over the last 50% of training. Trained at seq_len=2048 with batch=786432, grad_clip=0.3, warmdown=3000. Sliding window evaluation at stride=64.
